# Reeflex

> A seatbelt for the AI acting on your systems. Reeflex is a deterministic,
> open-source (Apache-2.0) governance gate that decides — before an AI agent's
> action reaches your data — whether it is safe to run, needs a human, or must
> be blocked. Decisions are made by OPA/Rego on computed impact (reversibility,
> blast radius, externality, cumulative session state). Zero LLM in the
> decision path: same action in, same decision out, every time, with an
> append-only audit record either way.

Reeflex governs at the resource, on impact — complementary to source-side
agent-governance platforms (identity/authorization), not a replacement for
them. Reference adapters ship for WordPress/WooCommerce (standard plugin and
mu-plugin), Claude Code, and any MCP upstream (`reeflex-mcp`, the MCP
gateway); any backend can be covered by implementing the public adapter
contract: intercept → normalize → enforce → audit.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): what Reeflex is, deploy on-prem in one command, usage
- [Quickstart](QUICKSTART.md): clone to a working demo in under 10 minutes
- [Specification](reeflex-spec/SPEC.md): the Action Envelope and Adapter Contract
- [Impact model](reeflex-spec/IMPACT-MODEL.md): how impact is computed, in depth
- [WordPress adapter](reeflex-wordpress/README.md): install from the wp-admin UI or as a mu-plugin
- [Claude Code adapter](reeflex-claude/README.md): gate every Claude Code tool call
- [MCP gateway](docs/mcp-gateway.md): govern any existing MCP server, no client rewrite (`reeflex-mcp/README.md` for the package docs)
- [Open-core boundary](docs/open-core.md): everything that keeps you safe is free, forever
- [Architecture whitepaper (PDF)](docs/Reeflex_Architecture.pdf): visual walkthrough and use cases
- [Roadmap](ROADMAP.md): what is planned vs. what ships today
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): new adapters and policy packs are genuinely welcome

## Optional

- [Architecture notes](docs/architecture.md): decision flow and deployment variants
- [ADR-0002](docs/adr/0002-no-llm-in-decision-path.md): why there is no LLM in the decision path
- [Verification tool](reeflex-verify/README.md): fire real actions at a live install and see allow/hold/deny
